title: lathyrus variabilis f. ovalifolius
intro: Lathyrus variabilis f. ovalifolius, also known as a variant of the sweet pea vine, is a flowering plant in the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus variabilis f. ovalifolius include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, cough syrups, and other medicinal products.
